titleStmt.title: SII 19.121: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 121. (A.R. No. 686 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀṞKAḌAL, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, KHARAPURĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is built in the middle. This records an agreement by the mahā-sabhā of Kāvidippākkam alias Amaninārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Paḍuvūr-kōṭṭam through their Tank Supervision Committee to burn a perpetual lamp in the local temple of Tirukkarapurattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ and in that of Tiruvagattīśvarattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ at Pākkam. For the former they received a piece of garden-land endowed by one Śivapūdi Āchchanādaṉ son of Mahāsēna-Kramavittar, and for the latter, a gift of 50 (kāśu) of pure gold from Śembiyaṉ Iḷaṅgōvēḷār Pūdi Ādittar. This donor was evidently a Koḍumbāḷūr chieftain. Mention is made of certain aṅgamaṇi-dravya (cash realised by sale of ornaments) which was the property of the donor's (deceased) mother, out of which he is said to have purchased the land endowed. An executive official servant of the sabhā called the Śiṟṟūrāṭchikoḷvāṉ who was appointed for the year, was to look after the maintenence of the gift.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . koparakecariparmmaṟku yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatu paṭuvūrkoṭṭattu kāvatipākkamākiya Amaṉiṉārāyaṇaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu perumakkaḷum bhaṭṭarkaḷum viśiṣṭarkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom Emmur Aṇaikkiḻ
kaiyār makaṉār mahāsenakkiramavittar muttanaṅkaiyār makaṉār civapūti Āccaṉātaṉukku mutukaṇṇāka ṉār mahāsenakramavi ṉarudrarkittikramavittarpakkal tam tāyār koḷḷakka(ṭ)aiva Aṅkamaṇi dravyavṛtthikkuk cilavākak kū ṭṭut toṭṭam ceytu nūṟṟumuppat
toṉṟarai kuḻiyum koṇṭu Emmur tirukkarapurattu perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Oru nandāviḷakkum Emmur pākkattu tiruvakattiśvarattu perumāṉaṭika
paṇiyāl Iyyāṭṭai Erivāriyapperumakkaḷom cempiyaṉ Iḷaṅkoveḷār pūti Ātittarpak kal Oṉpatarai māṟi niṟai Aympatiṉ
vāṭṭai Erivāriyapperumakkaḷe muṭṭāme kuṭuppārākavum Innandāviḷakkukku Avvavāṇṭu ciṟṟūrāṭcikoḷvāṉaiye koṇṭu nicati ṉuṅ koḷḷappiṟātār .
Digital edition of SII 19.121 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
